name: prompt-db-local
description: Local Electron + React app for managing prompt JSON data and importing from producer.ai.

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist-electron/electron/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 node scripts/launch-electron.cjs .
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.build:electron: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist-electron', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json
